allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=nyhlisted psql -U postgres -h localhost -d least_cost_feed_dev -c "SELECT f.id, f.name FROM formulas f JOIN users u ON u.id = f.user_id WHERE u.email = 'tankwanghow@gmail.com' AND \(f.name ILIKE '%pullet%' OR f.name ILIKE '%pre%lay%' OR f.name ILIKE '%developer%'\) ORDER BY f.id;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=nyhlisted psql -U postgres -h localhost -d least_cost_feed_dev -c "SELECT i.name FROM ingredients i JOIN users u ON u.id = i.user_id WHERE u.email = 'tankwanghow@gmail.com' AND i.name IN \('Corn Grain', 'SS Soyabean Meal HP', 'SS Soyabean Meal NP', 'Wheat Bran', 'Rice Bran', 'Limestone', 'MDCP21', 'Palm Oil', 'Sodium Bicab', 'Common Salt', 'DL-Methionine 99', 'L-Lysine HCl', 'L-Threonine', 'L-Tryptophan', 'L-Valine', 'Choline Cl - 60%', 'Quantum Blue 10G \(60g/MT\) Layer', 'Quantum Blue 10G \(75g/MT\) Pullet'\) ORDER BY i.name;")
